entries.source: "Ask a teacher for help"
entries.value: "Iarr cabhair ar mhúinteoir"

entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Cuir ceisteanna orm sula míníonn tú an iomarca."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Seiceáil mo fhreagra sula dtugann tú do cheann féin."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Tabhair leagan níos deacra dom tar éis dom triail a bhaint as."

entries.source: "Handle a rude customer"
entries.value: "Déileáil le custaiméir drochbhéasach"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Coinnigh cairdiúil do thosaitheoirí é."

entries.source: "Negotiate a deadline"
entries.value: "Déan spriocdháta a chaibidliú"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Úsáid samplaí ó mo scrúdú, tionscadal, nó saol laethúil."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: Prasaí IS

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Iarr tasc beag bídeach ar dtús.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Críochnaigh le hachoimre a scríobhann tú féin.

entries.source: For Roleplay Scenario, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Do Roleplay Scenario, is é seo lúb chleachtaidh úsáideach:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cleacht caibidlíocht, coimhlint, tacaíocht custaiméara, ceannaireacht, nó aon chomhrá ardriosca.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: De ghnáth cuimsíonn prasaí maithe trí rud: an t-ábhar, do leibhéal reatha, agus an cineál cabhrach atá uait. Ní gá foclaíocht fhoirfe a bheith agat. Níl uait ach go leor comhthéacs chun an seisiún a thosú.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Má mhothaíonn an freagra róleathan, cúng é. Iarr sampla amháin, míthuiscint amháin, ceist seiceála amháin, nó chéad chéim amháin eile. Má mhothaíonn sé ró-éasca, iarr dúshlán. Má mhothaíonn sé ró-dheacair, iarr droichead ón méid atá ar eolas agat cheana.

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: Tumadh

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Déan an t-aschur níos úsáidí

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Roleplay Scenario on inspir.
entries.value: Smaointe pras agus lúb staidéir in-athúsáidte chun torthaí foghlama úsáideacha a fháil ó Roleplay Scenario ar inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Ní hionann freagra IS a léamh agus foghlaim. Tar éis an chéad fhreagra, iarr ar an mód rud éigin a dhéanamh leat leis an smaoineamh.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Conairí foghlama gaolmhara

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Iarr aiseolas ar an gcuid a mhothaigh éiginnte.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Freagair sula n-iarrann tú an réiteach.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prasaí agus lúb staidéir Roleplay Scenario

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Tosaigh le hiarratas soiléir amháin

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Luaigh an sprioc in aon abairt amháin.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: scileanna staidéir

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Tá an achoimre dheiridh sin tábhachtach. Nuair a mhíníonn tú an smaoineamh ar ais, nochtann tú cad atá daingean agus cad atá fós ar iasacht ón IS.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for roleplay scenario with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Tá na seisiúin foghlama is fearr inchoigeartaithe. Tá an mód seo tiúnta do roleplay scenario lena phrasaí, samplaí, agus sreabhadh foghlama féin.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Roleplay Scenario is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Is é an bealach is tapúla le luach a fháil ó Roleplay Scenario post foghlama a thabhairt don IS, ní ábhar amháin. Deir ábhar cad atá suim agat ann. Deir post foghlama cén cineál cabhrach atá uait.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Ansin cuir srian leis a dhéanann an seisiún níos pearsanta:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Bain triail as ceann de na tosaithe seo:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Déan cleachtadh den mhód

entries.source: Use Roleplay Scenario when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Case Study Simulator. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Roleplay Scenario nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Case Study Simulator. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.
